neighborhoods.name: Barrio Historico
neighborhoods.description: UNESCO Portuguese colonial quarter with cobblestone streets, lighthouse, and Rio de la Plata sunsets

housing.predominantType: Restored colonial houses and small apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Colonia del Sacramento. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Colonia del Sacramento

neighborhoods.name: Colonia Centro
neighborhoods.description: Modern town center with shops, restaurants, and ferry terminal with service to Buenos Aires
neighborhoods.character: Town center, ferry to BA, practical services

housing.predominantType: Houses and apartments near commercial center

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Colonia del Sacramento's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Colonia del Sacramento

neighborhoods.name: Juan Lacaze
neighborhoods.description: Former textile town west of Colonia with very affordable housing and improving amenities
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Colonia del Sacramento

neighborhoods.name: Carmelo
neighborhoods.description: Wine country town northwest of Colonia with boutique wineries and growing expat interest
neighborhoods.character: Wine country, boutique tourism, emerging expat

housing.predominantType: Houses, quintas, and wine country properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Colonia del Sacramento
